30.description: Welcome House is Northern Kentucky's largest homelessness services provider, operating since 1982 across multiple regions of the state. In Northern Kentucky, they offer emergency shelter, rapid re-housing, housing navigation, case management, and supportive housing for women, children, families, and adults—including people recently released from incarceration or treatment. Services span homeless solutions and long-term housing stability programs.
30.description_es: Welcome House es el principal proveedor de servicios para personas sin hogar en el norte de Kentucky, operando desde 1982 en varias regiones del estado. En el norte de Kentucky ofrece refugio de emergencia, realojamiento rápido, orientación en vivienda, manejo de casos y vivienda con apoyo para mujeres, niños, familias y adultos—incluidos recién liberados del encarcelamiento o tratamiento. Los servicios abarcan soluciones de emergencia y estabilidad a largo plazo.
30.notes: Main Northern Kentucky office. Also operates regional offices in Owensboro, Maysville, Morehead, Ashland, and Somerset. Ask about rapid re-housing and shelter availability at intake.
30.notes_es: Oficina principal del norte de Kentucky. También opera oficinas regionales en Owensboro, Maysville, Morehead, Ashland y Somerset. Pregunte sobre realojamiento rápido y disponibilidad de refugio.
30.services: Emergency shelter|Rapid re-housing|Housing navigation|Case management|Supportive housing|Family stabilization

31.description: Transitions, Inc. has provided substance use treatment in Northern Kentucky since 1969. The Covington campus offers intake and triage, medically supervised detox, residential rehabilitation, intensive outpatient (IOP), standard outpatient services, targeted case management, and Casey's Law assessments. Accepts Kentucky, Ohio, and Indiana Medicaid and most commercial insurance. Multiple Covington locations serve the broader NKY region.
31.description_es: Transitions, Inc. ofrece tratamiento de uso de sustancias en el norte de Kentucky desde 1969. El campus de Covington ofrece ingreso y triaje, desintoxicación supervisada, rehabilitación residencial, tratamiento ambulatorio intensivo (IOP), servicios ambulatorios, manejo de casos y evaluaciones de la Ley Casey. Acepta Medicaid de Kentucky, Ohio e Indiana. Varias ubicaciones en Covington sirven la región NKY.
31.notes: Call main line for intake and level-of-care assessment. Casey's Law assessments scheduled on-site; see transitionsky.org for process guide.
31.notes_es: Llame a la línea principal para ingreso y evaluación del nivel de atención. Evaluaciones de la Ley Casey en el sitio; consulte transitionsky.org.
31.hours: Call for intake hours; outpatient IOP typically evenings
31.services: Intake and triage|Medical detox|Residential treatment|Intensive outpatient|Case management|Casey's Law assessment|Recovery housing referrals

32.description: Transitions' Grateful Life Center in Erlanger is a 110-bed Recovery Kentucky therapeutic community for men committed to long-term sobriety. The voluntary program uses peer accountability, a buddy system, 12-step sponsorship, onsite mental health therapy, and primary care access. Kentucky DOC lists Grateful Life as an affiliated reentry and recovery resource. Part of the statewide Recovery Kentucky network funded by KHC, DLG, and DOC.
32.description_es: El Grateful Life Center de Transitions en Erlanger es una comunidad terapéutica Recovery Kentucky de 110 camas para hombres comprometidos con la sobriedad a largo plazo. El programa voluntario usa responsabilidad entre pares, sistema de apoyo, patrocinio de 12 pasos, terapia de salud mental en el sitio y acceso a atención primaria. El DOC de Kentucky lo lista como recurso de reinserción y recuperación.
32.notes: Recovery Kentucky men's program. Voluntary admission. PREA coordinator: Brandon Suhr. Anonymous PREA hotline: 1-833-362-7732.
32.notes_es: Programa Recovery Kentucky para hombres. Admisión voluntaria. Coordinador PREA: Brandon Suhr. Línea PREA anónima: 1-833-362-7732.
32.hours: Call for admissions and visiting hours
32.services: Long-term residential recovery|Peer accountability program|12-step support|Mental health therapy|Primary care access|Recovery Kentucky housing

40.description: The Men's Addiction Recovery Center (MARC) in Bowling Green is a free, nonprofit inpatient recovery program for adult men and a Recovery Kentucky affiliate. Uses a peer-driven 12-step model integrated with the Recovery Dynamics curriculum in a structured sober living community. No cost to clients. Kentucky DOC lists MARC as an approved recovery and reentry resource for men with substance use disorders.
40.description_es: El Men's Addiction Recovery Center (MARC) en Bowling Green es un programa gratuito de recuperación para hombres adultos y afiliado a Recovery Kentucky. Usa un modelo entre pares de 12 pasos con el plan Recovery Dynamics en una comunidad de vida sobria estructurada. Sin costo para los clientes. El DOC de Kentucky lo lista como recurso aprobado de recuperación y reinserción.
40.notes: Free to clients. Voluntary long-term residential program. Director: Nicole Frield. Recovery Kentucky initiative—13 centers statewide.
40.notes_es: Gratuito para clientes. Programa residencial voluntario a largo plazo. Iniciativa Recovery Kentucky—13 centros en el estado.
40.services: Free inpatient recovery|Recovery Dynamics curriculum|12-step programming|Peer-driven sober living|Long-term residential care

41.description: Haven4Change is a licensed residential transitional living program in Bowling Green for women age 18+ recovering from substance abuse, and their children age 12 and younger. The 6–12 month structured program includes case management, weekly progress meetings, recovery-focused living, and connections to employment, benefits, and counseling. A second location serves Scottsville in Allen County. Goal: reunification with children and drug-free independent living.
41.description_es: Haven4Change es un programa con licencia de vivienda transitoria residencial en Bowling Green para mujeres de 18+ en recuperación de sustancias y sus hijos de 12 años o menos. El programa estructurado de 6–12 meses incluye manejo de casos, reuniones semanales, vida centrada en la recuperación y conexiones con empleo, beneficios y consejería. Una segunda ubicación sirve Scottsville. Meta: reunificación con hijos y vida independiente libre de drogas.
41.notes: Licensed residential transitional living (#810260). Children ages 12 and under may reside with mother. Screening and assessment required before admission.
41.notes_es: Vivienda transitoria residencial con licencia (#810260). Hijos de 12 años o menos pueden vivir con la madre. Se requiere evaluación antes de la admisión.
41.services: Transitional housing for women|Children allowed|Case management|Recovery programming|Employment and benefits navigation|Family reunification support

50.description: The Bluegrass Career Development Center (BCDC) is a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center in Richmond operated by the Bluegrass Regional Recycling Corporation. The ~88-bed men's facility houses state inmates near parole eligibility and offers on-the-job training in recycling and manufacturing, plus certifications in CDL prep, culinary arts, forklift/OSHA, and other vocational tracks. DOC-approved courses may earn up to 90 days meritorious good-time credit per completed program.
50.description_es: El Bluegrass Career Development Center (BCDC) es un Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC en Richmond, operado por Bluegrass Regional Recycling Corporation. La instalación de ~88 camas alberga reclusos estatales cerca de elegibilidad para libertad condicional y ofrece capacitación laboral en reciclaje y manufactura, más certificaciones en CDL, artes culinarias, montacargas/OSHA y otras vías vocacionales. Cursos aprobados por el DOC pueden otorgar hasta 90 días de crédito de buen comportamiento.
50.notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC for men. Referrals through DOC Probation and Parole. Adjacent BRRC recycling training facility. PREA hotline: 1-833-362-7732.
50.notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC para hombres. Referidos a través de Probation and Parole del DOC. Instalación de capacitación en reciclaje adyacente. Línea PREA: 1-833-362-7732.
50.hours: Call for intake; residential program operates 24/7
50.services: Transitional reentry housing|Vocational certifications|Recycling and manufacturing training|CDL preparation|Culinary arts training|OSHA and forklift certification|Educational good-time credit

51.description: Liberty Place Recovery Center for Women in Richmond is a free, 108-bed Recovery Kentucky long-term residential program operated by Kentucky River Foothills Development Council. Serves women across Central and Eastern Kentucky (6th Congressional District) with a phased model: Safe Off the Streets entry, motivational tracks, on-site work responsibilities, and community reintegration planning. Services are free; program includes peer support, 12-step work, Recovery Dynamics, and employment preparation.
51.description_es: Liberty Place Recovery Center for Women en Richmond es un programa residencial gratuito de 108 camas Recovery Kentucky operado por Kentucky River Foothills. Atiende mujeres del centro y este de Kentucky con un modelo por fases: ingreso Safe Off the Streets, pistas motivacionales, responsabilidades laborales en el sitio y planificación de reintegración comunitaria. Servicios gratuitos; incluye apoyo entre pares, 12 pasos, Recovery Dynamics y preparación laboral.
51.notes: Free to clients. Recovery Kentucky program. SOS entry via telephone screening. Partnership with Mountain Comprehensive Care Center for clinical services.
51.notes_es: Gratuito para clientes. Programa Recovery Kentucky. Ingreso SOS mediante evaluación telefónica. Asociación con Mountain Comprehensive Care Center.
51.hours: Call (859) 625-0104 for SOS screening and admissions
51.services: Free women's residential recovery|Safe Off the Streets entry|Recovery Dynamics|12-step programming|Employment preparation|Phased sober living|Peer support

60.description: Dismas Charities Owensboro is a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center providing residential reentry housing and structured programming for men and women in Western Kentucky. Residents receive community-based supervision support, employment assistance, substance abuse programming, and help reconnecting with family and employers. Referrals typically come from Kentucky DOC, federal Bureau of Prisons, or courts—call to confirm availability.
60.description_es: Dismas Charities Owensboro es un Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC que ofrece vivienda residencial de reinserción y programación estructurada para hombres y mujeres en el oeste de Kentucky. Los residentes reciben apoyo de supervisión comunitaria, asistencia laboral, programación de sustancias y ayuda para reconectar con familia y empleadores. Referidos del DOC de Kentucky, Buró de Prisiones o tribunales.
60.notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC. Residential reentry center at 615 Carlton Drive. Institutional referral typically required.
60.notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC. Centro residencial de reinserción en 615 Carlton Drive. Generalmente se requiere referido institucional.
60.hours: Call for intake and visiting hours
60.services: Residential reentry housing|Employment assistance|Substance abuse programming|Community supervision support|Family reunification

70.description: WestCare Kentucky's Lookout Center (Judi Patton Center for Healthy Families) in Elkhorn City is a Kentucky DOC-affiliated women's residential substance use treatment facility in Eastern Kentucky. Serves justice-involved women, veterans, and pregnant or postpartum women with substance use, opioid use, or co-occurring disorders. Offers intensive AOD treatment, gender-responsive counseling, vocational skills, 12-step introduction, and reentry coordination. Connected to WestCare's Pike County jail recovery and Hal Rogers Appalachian Recovery Center network.
70.description_es: El Lookout Center de WestCare Kentucky (Judi Patton Center for Healthy Families) en Elkhorn City es una instalación residencial de tratamiento de sustancias para mujeres afiliada al DOC en el este de Kentucky. Atiende mujeres en el sistema de justicia, veteranas y mujeres embarazadas o posparto con trastornos por sustancias u opioides. Ofrece tratamiento intensivo, consejería sensible al género, habilidades vocacionales, introducción a 12 pasos y coordinación de reinserción.
70.notes: Also known as Lookout Center for Healthy Families (LCHF). Main line (606) 772-3012; after-hours/weekends: (606) 772-3018. DOC-listed reentry and recovery resource.
70.notes_es: También conocido como Lookout Center for Healthy Families (LCHF). Línea principal (606) 772-3012; fuera de horario: (606) 772-3018. Recurso de reinserción listado por el DOC.
70.hours: Call main line for admissions; after-hours (606) 772-3018
70.services: Women's residential treatment|Justice-involved programming|Prenatal and postpartum care|Vocational skills training|12-step introduction|Reentry coordination

71.description: Keeton Corrections Paducah is a Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center providing residential transitional housing and reentry programming for Western Kentucky. The non-secure community confinement facility helps state inmates, parolees, and probationers transition back to the community with structured supervision, programming, and employment preparation. Referrals through Kentucky DOC Probation and Parole.
71.description_es: Keeton Corrections Paducah es un Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC que ofrece vivienda transitoria residencial y programación de reinserción en el oeste de Kentucky. La instalación de confinamiento comunitario ayuda a reclusos estatales, personas en libertad condicional y bajo supervisión a reintegrarse con supervisión estructurada y preparación laboral. Referidos del DOC de Kentucky.
71.notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC. Director: Dan L. Sims. Non-secure community confinement; referrals through DOC Probation and Parole at 502-564-7023.
71.notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC. Confinamiento comunitario no seguro; referidos a través de Probation and Parole del DOC al 502-564-7023.
71.hours: Call for intake and visiting hours
71.services: Residential transitional housing|Reentry programming|Community confinement|Employment preparation|DOC supervision coordination

80.description: Oxford House Kentucky is the statewide network of self-run, self-supported sober living homes for people in recovery from substance use—including those leaving incarceration, treatment, or supervision. Each house is democratically operated; members share expenses and vote on admissions. A dedicated reentry coordinator (502-830-8082) helps justice-involved individuals find vacancies and navigate the interview process. Houses exist across Louisville, Lexington, NKY, Eastern, Southern, and Western Kentucky regions.
80.description_es: Oxford House Kentucky es la red estatal de hogares de vida sobria autogestionados y autofinanciados para personas en recuperación de sustancias—incluidas quienes salen del encarcelamiento, tratamiento o supervisión. Cada casa opera democráticamente; los miembros comparten gastos y votan admisiones. Un coordinador de reinserción dedicado (502-830-8082) ayuda a encontrar vacantes. Casas en Louisville, Lexington, NKY, este, sur y oeste de Kentucky.
80.notes: Reentry line: (502) 830-8082 or reentryky@oxfordhouse.us. Online re-entry application at oxfordhouseky.org/reentry. Each house conducts its own interview; supervision approval may be required.
80.notes_es: Línea de reinserción: (502) 830-8082 o reentryky@oxfordhouse.us. Solicitud en línea en oxfordhouseky.org/reentry. Cada casa realiza su propia entrevista; puede requerirse aprobación de supervisión.
80.hours: Reentry coordinator responds within 24 hours; house interviews vary
80.services: Sober living placement assistance|Reentry application support|Democratic self-run housing|Peer accountability|Statewide vacancy navigation

100.description: Goodwill Industries of Kentucky's RISE program (Reintegrating Individuals Successfully Every Day) provides free virtual two-week job-readiness training for justice-involved Kentuckians. Covers soft skills, financial literacy, digital literacy, communication, resume writing, mock interviews, and behavioral health topics. Graduates earn a Work Ready Certificate and may receive a Chromebook, stipend, and gym membership. Offered in Louisville, Lexington, Bowling Green, Pikeville, and other Opportunity Center locations serving 103 counties.
100.description_es: El programa RISE de Goodwill Industries of Kentucky (Reintegrando Individuos Exitosamente Cada Día) ofrece capacitación virtual gratuita de dos semanas en preparación laboral para personas con antecedentes de justicia. Cubre habilidades blandas, educación financiera, alfabetización digital, comunicación, currículum y entrevistas simuladas. Los graduados reciben certificado Work Ready y pueden obtener Chromebook, estipendio y membresía de gimnasio. Disponible en Louisville, Lexington, Bowling Green, Pikeville y más.
100.notes: Also runs Aspire pre-release program at multiple DOC facilities. RISE contact: Lexington (859) 806-7956, Bowling Green (270) 781-4930, Pikeville (606) 561-0359. Prerequisite courses required before RISE enrollment.
100.notes_es: También opera el programa Aspire antes de la liberación en varias instalaciones del DOC. Contacto RISE: Lexington (859) 806-7956, Bowling Green (270) 781-4930, Pikeville (606) 561-0359. Se requieren cursos previos.
100.hours: Varies by Opportunity Center; call local center for RISE schedule
100.services: Job-readiness training|Work Ready Certificate|Resume and interview coaching|Financial and digital literacy|Chromebook and stipend incentives|Aspire pre-release program

101.description: Goodwill Industries of Kentucky partners with Legal Aid organizations statewide to host free expungement clinics for eligible criminal records. Attorneys review records, determine eligibility, and Goodwill covers filing fees in its 103-county service area. Over 8,500 records cleared to date. Clinics held throughout the year in cities including Louisville, Lexington, Corbin, and more—registration opens before each event. Does not cover counties outside Goodwill's service area (refer to Kentucky Legal Aid for those).
101.description_es: Goodwill Industries of Kentucky se asocia con organizaciones de Legal Aid en todo el estado para clínicas gratuitas de eliminación de antecedentes penales elegibles. Abogados revisan registros, determinan elegibilidad y Goodwill cubre honorarios de presentación en su área de 103 condados. Más de 8,500 registros eliminados. Clínicas durante el año en Louisville, Lexington, Corbin y más—registro antes de cada evento.
101.notes: Free clinic attendance and attorney consultation. Goodwill pays filing fees in its service area. $40 Kentucky State Police certification fee may still apply. See goodwillky.org/expungements for 2026 clinic dates.
101.notes_es: Consulta gratuita en clínicas. Goodwill paga honorarios en su área de servicio. Puede aplicar tarifa de certificación de $40 del State Police. Consulte fechas 2026 en goodwillky.org/expungements.
101.hours: Clinic dates vary; check website for registration
101.services: Free expungement clinics|Attorney record review|Filing fee assistance|Eligibility screening|Statewide clinic events

102.description: The Kentucky Career Center in Louisville (KentuckianaWorks) is a free American Job Center helping job seekers—including those recently released from incarceration—with resume building, interview preparation, career counseling, workshops, and job placement connections. Career specialists provide individualized support at the Goodwill Opportunity Campus on West Broadway. All services are free. Also connects to GED assistance and training referrals.
102.description_es: El Kentucky Career Center en Louisville (KentuckianaWorks) es un Centro de Trabajo Americano gratuito que ayuda a quienes buscan empleo—incluidos recién liberados—con currículum, preparación para entrevistas, orientación profesional, talleres y conexiones laborales. Especialistas brindan apoyo individualizado en el Goodwill Opportunity Campus en West Broadway. Todos los servicios son gratuitos.
102.notes: Also serves Shelby, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Spencer, and Trimble counties via appointment. Training scholarships availability varies—check with center.
102.notes_es: También sirve condados Shelby, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Spencer y Trimble con cita. Disponibilidad de becas de capacitación varía—consulte con el centro.
102.services: Free job search assistance|Resume and interview coaching|Career counseling|Workshops|GED referrals|Training program connections

103.description: Kentucky Career Center – Bluegrass is the American Job Center serving 17 Central Kentucky counties including Fayette, Madison, Jessamine, and Woodford. Free services include job search assistance, resume workshops, career assessment, veterans' services, youth programs, and referrals to training and credentialing. Staff help justice-involved job seekers connect to employment opportunities and barrier-removal resources.
103.description_es: Kentucky Career Center – Bluegrass es el Centro de Trabajo Americano que sirve 17 condados del centro de Kentucky incluyendo Fayette, Madison, Jessamine y Woodford. Servicios gratuitos: búsqueda de empleo, talleres de currículum, evaluación profesional, servicios para veteranos, programas juveniles y referencias a capacitación. Ayudan a personas con antecedentes de justicia a conectar con empleo.
103.notes: Serves Anderson, Bourbon, Boyle, Clark, Estill, Fayette, Franklin, Garrard, Harrison, Jessamine, Lincoln, Madison, Mercer, Nicholas, Powell, Scott, and Woodford counties.
103.notes_es: Sirve los condados Anderson, Bourbon, Boyle, Clark, Estill, Fayette, Franklin, Garrard, Harrison, Jessamine, Lincoln, Madison, Mercer, Nicholas, Powell, Scott y Woodford.
103.services: Free job search assistance|Resume workshops|Career assessment|Veterans services|Youth employment programs|Training referrals

104.description: The Northern Kentucky Kentucky Career Center connects job seekers and employers across Boone, Kenton, Campbell, and surrounding counties through a network of 20+ partner organizations. Free career coaching, job readiness workshops, resume services, WIOA training funding, and specialized support for veterans, people with disabilities, and individuals in addiction recovery. Weekly orientation events introduce partner services.
104.description_es: El Kentucky Career Center del norte de Kentucky conecta buscadores de empleo y empleadores en Boone, Kenton, Campbell y condados circundantes a través de más de 20 organizaciones aliadas. Orientación profesional gratuita, talleres, servicios de currículum, financiamiento WIOA y apoyo especializado para veteranos, personas con discapacidades y personas en recuperación. Eventos semanales de orientación.
104.notes: Partners include Gateway Community College, Goodwill, and TANK transit. Tuesday orientation 10–11 a.m. For unemployment claims, visit kcc.ky.gov or call 502-564-2900.
104.notes_es: Aliados incluyen Gateway Community College, Goodwill y TANK. Orientación los martes 10–11 a.m. Para reclamaciones de desempleo, visite kcc.ky.gov o llame al 502-564-2900.
104.services: Career coaching|Job readiness workshops|Resume services|WIOA training funding|Veterans and disability services|Recovery-informed employment support

105.description: The Kentucky Career Center in Bowling Green serves Warren County and the surrounding area with free American Job Center services: job search assistance, resume help, employment workshops, career counseling, and referrals to training programs. Part of the statewide workforce development network. Open to all job seekers including those with justice-involved backgrounds rebuilding employment history.
105.description_es: El Kentucky Career Center en Bowling Green sirve el Condado de Warren y el área circundante con servicios gratuitos del Centro de Trabajo Americano: búsqueda de empleo, ayuda con currículum, talleres, orientación profesional y referencias a capacitación. Parte de la red estatal de desarrollo laboral. Abierto a todos, incluidos quienes reconstruyen su historial laboral tras el sistema de justicia.
105.notes: Warren County American Job Center. Part of Southcentral Kentucky workforce development network.
105.notes_es: Centro de Trabajo Americano del Condado de Warren. Parte de la red de desarrollo laboral del centro-sur de Kentucky.
105.services: Free job search assistance|Resume help|Employment workshops|Career counseling|Training program referrals

106.description: Kentucky Career Center – TENCO serves northeastern Kentucky including Boyd, Greenup, Carter, Fleming, Lewis, Mason, and surrounding counties from its Ashland location. Free American Job Center services include career counseling, job preparation, portfolio building, WIOA training accounts, apprenticeships, and employer connections. Four center locations: Ashland, Maysville, Mt. Sterling, and Morehead.
106.description_es: Kentucky Career Center – TENCO sirve el noreste de Kentucky incluyendo Boyd, Greenup, Carter, Fleming, Lewis, Mason y condados circundantes desde Ashland. Servicios gratuitos: orientación profesional, preparación laboral, portafolios, cuentas de capacitación WIOA, aprendizajes y conexiones con empleadores. Cuatro ubicaciones: Ashland, Maysville, Mt. Sterling y Morehead.
106.notes: TENCO Workforce Development Board region: Bath, Boyd, Bracken, Fleming, Greenup, Lewis, Mason, Montgomery, Robertson, and Rowan counties.
106.notes_es: Región TENCO: condados Bath, Boyd, Bracken, Fleming, Greenup, Lewis, Mason, Montgomery, Robertson y Rowan.
106.services: Career counseling|Job preparation|WIOA training accounts|Apprenticeships|Employer recruiting support|Community resource navigation

107.description: EKCEP (Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program) administers the SITE program (Strategic Initiative for Transformational Employment) across 23 Appalachian counties, bridging addiction recovery and workforce participation. Recovery-informed employment specialists provide hands-on training, work experience, barrier relief (transportation, gear, certifications), and career advising for people in reentry or recovery. Headquartered in Hazard with Kentucky Career Center JobSight locations across the region.
107.description_es: EKCEP administra el programa SITE (Iniciativa Estratégica para el Empleo Transformacional) en 23 condados apalaches, conectando recuperación de adicciones y participación laboral. Especialistas en empleo informados sobre recuperación ofrecen capacitación práctica, experiencia laboral, alivio de barreras (transporte, equipo, certificaciones) y asesoramiento profesional para personas en reinserción o recuperación. Sede en Hazard.
107.notes: Also operates Project REACH in 8 counties. SITE funded in part by KORE/SAMHSA and Kentucky Office of Drug Control Policy. Call for nearest JobSight location in your county.
107.notes_es: También opera Project REACH en 8 condados. SITE financiado parcialmente por KORE/SAMHSA. Llame para la ubicación JobSight más cercana en su condado.
107.services: Recovery-informed job training|Work experience placements|Barrier relief assistance|Career advising|Certification support|Project REACH employment services

108.description: Kentucky's Department of Professional Licensing (DPL) oversees 25 occupational licensing boards. Under HB 185 (2026), individuals with criminal records can petition a licensing board for a predetermination on whether their conviction would disqualify them from a specific license—before investing in training or fees. Boards may only deny when a conviction directly relates to the occupation and must provide written findings. Contact DPL to be routed to the correct board.
108.description_es: El Departamento de Licencias Profesionales de Kentucky (DPL) supervisa 25 juntas de licencias ocupacionales. Bajo HB 185 (2026), personas con antecedentes penales pueden solicitar a una junta una predeterminación sobre si su condena los descalificaría de una licencia específica—antes de invertir en capacitación o tarifas. Las juntas solo pueden negar cuando la condena se relacione directamente con la ocupación. Contacte al DPL para ser dirigido a la junta correcta.
108.notes: HB 185 predetermination process: boards must establish procedures by January 1, 2027. Boards consider rehabilitation evidence, time since offense, and relationship to licensed duties. Not a legal aid service—contact Legal Aid or Goodwill for expungement help separately.
108.notes_es: Proceso de predeterminación HB 185: las juntas deben establecer procedimientos antes del 1 de enero de 2027. Consideran evidencia de rehabilitación, tiempo desde la ofensa y relación con las funciones licenciadas. No es asistencia legal—contacte Legal Aid o Goodwill para eliminación de antecedentes.
108.services: Licensing board referrals|HB 185 predetermination information|Occupational license guidance|Board contact routing
